name: Stage 1: PDF Upload
description: Receives PDF upload from Tenderly, extracts text, calls xAI to extract metadata, writes tender row to Supabase.

config.body: {{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'grok-3-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert tender-analysis system. Extract key metadata from the tender document. Return a valid JSON object with EXACTLY these fields: {"title": "Concise tender title (3-4 words describing task and location)", "summary": "One concise sentence describing the procurement scope", "buyer": "Issuing organization name", "region": "Geographic location", "deadline": "Submission deadline in YYYY-MM-DD format or null", "category": "Brief category", "tender_type": "goods|services|works|mixed"}. The output language must match the document language. Return ONLY the JSON object.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.text_for_metadata }], temperature: 0 }) }}
